name: Create Requisition
description: Define and submit a new job requisition for approval.

name: Post Job
description: Publish the approved requisition to internal and external job boards.

name: Screen Candidates
description: Review and shortlist applicants for further evaluation.

name: Conduct Interviews
description: Schedule and conduct interviews with shortlisted candidates.

name: Create Offer
description: Prepare and issue an offer to the selected candidate.
